title: iris sintenisii subsp. brandzae
intro: Iris sintenisii subsp. brandzae, also known as the Brandza iris, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the iris family (Iridaceae). It is a perennial plant native to Romania, known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues and skin problems. The plant's roots and rhizomes contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat conditions such as bronchitis, coughs, and skin irritations. Iris sintenisii subsp. brandzae can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for its medicinal uses, and its rhizomes can be dried and processed into herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and powders.
